meta.title: Star Performers
meta.sourceDoc: 104. P3 - Star Performers 明星员工.pdf

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 27
答案：A
PDF 定位：A末: "this idea, that talent is a fixed, identifiable characteristic and that those firms with the best people do the best is both flawed and harmful.
PDF 解析：明确反对"雇最有才的人→公司表现最佳"的观点。

题目 28
答案：E
PDF 定位：E段中部: exceptional performance doesn't happen without around ten years of nearly daily, deliberate practice for about four hours a day, by people who, with the assistance of their coaches, have access to the best techniques."
PDF 解析：说明个人需要长期、几乎每天的刻意练习（还有教练协助）来提升表现。

题目 29
答案：B
PDF 定位：B段开头:"in every field, from sports to computer programing to music, there are people who are better than the rest."
PDF 解析：证明各领域都存在杰出人才（star/exceptionaltalent)。

题目 30
答案：F
PDF 定位：F段开头与中部："see performance results as an opportunity for an assessment... results in lower performance and poor motivation... 'performance goals... more prone to helpless behaviour... "learning goals.. strive for higher performance."
PDF 解析：不同的评估/目标框架（绩效目标Vs学习目标）→员工动机与反应不同。

题目 31
答案：C
PDF 定位：C段前半:"if performance naturally varies, any measurement taken at a single point in time... will have error and imprecision.
PDF 解析：明说评估的时间点会影响准确性（单次测量易出错)。

题目 32
答案：B
PDF 定位：B段例子:"in music, 16 individuals have produced about 50 per cent... while another 235 composers have produced the remaining half."
PDF 解析：给出不同个体贡献占比（16人占一半，235人占一半），正是"贡献程度"的量化。

questionSections.text:
题目 33
答案：16
PDF 定位：B段:"16 individuals have produced about 50 per cent of the Western classical music...
PDF 解析：问"有多少位被认定为特别有才华的西方古典作曲家?"此处的16人就是那批"star" 作曲家。填数字16。

题目 34
答案：Bach
PDF 定位：C段后半："for Bach to be considered a great musician, standards of music needed to change...
PDF 解析：说明巴赫需要后来评价标准改变才被认为伟大→早期认可度低。

题目 35
答案：coaches
PDF 定位：E段: "with the assistance of their coaches, have access to the best techniques."
PDF 解析：问"谁能帮助每天练习的人提高表现?"coaches（教练)。

items.text:
题目 33
答案：16
PDF 定位：B段:"16 individuals have produced about 50 per cent of the Western classical music...
PDF 解析：问"有多少位被认定为特别有才华的西方古典作曲家?"此处的16人就是那批"star" 作曲家。填数字16。

题目 34
答案：Bach
PDF 定位：C段后半："for Bach to be considered a great musician, standards of music needed to change...
PDF 解析：说明巴赫需要后来评价标准改变才被认为伟大→早期认可度低。

题目 35
答案：coaches
PDF 定位：E段: "with the assistance of their coaches, have access to the best techniques."
PDF 解析：问"谁能帮助每天练习的人提高表现?"coaches（教练)。

questionSections.text:
题目 36
答案：FALSE
PDF 定位：A段中部:"Most recruitment decisions are influenced by the skills and abilities... rather than their aptitude and attitude."
PDF 解析：题干说"公司通常依据品格招聘"；原文说主要依据技能与能力，而非态度/资 质→相矛盾。

题目 37
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 解析：文中没有说"某些体育领域比其他领域有更高比例的天赋"。只说各领域都有明星， 及识别失误的例子。

题目 38
答案：FALSE
PDF 定位：D段前半："best predictors... measures of intelligence. But even these correlate only loosely with performance... more than 80% of the variation... unexplained."
PDF 解析：题干称智力测量准确预测工作表现；原文说相关性很弱→错误。

题目 39
答案：TRUE
PDF 定位：D段后半：迈克尔·乔丹被高中教练淘汰；多位四分卫早期不被看好。
PDF 解析：明确存在被忽视的天才运动员→正确。

题目 40
答案：NOT GIVEN
PDF 解析：文章未谈"新成立组织员工具有最高动机"。动机讨论集中在Dweck的目标框架， 而非公司成立时间。
